impact: Restores deterministic public source inventory test discovery by providing the expected fixture filename without changing validator behavior or broader PP&D contracts.
summary: Add the expected public source inventory one-unsafe-field compatibility fixture path.
target_task: Task checkbox-69: Add a fixture-name compatibility repair for public source inventory tests only if `ppd/tests/fixtures/public_source_inventory/invalid_one_unsafe_field_inventory.json` is still missing while the accepted one-unsafe-field fixture exists under another name.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
